creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Sorry for the belated response; never really got round to this and amid the process of moving, it was on the back-burner for a while. 

I've updated lagrange to the latest release (1.16.5) at the time of me posting this comment[1], which should have fixed a number of prevailing issues.  Should you encounter anything please let me know, as I have now the availability.

Cheers

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=e9e4112b1ece6e5abd
